content: Project shadcn-style primitive idiom (overstory-6f5a): components in ui/src/components/ui/ use cva (even with no variants — single base string), 'data-slot' attribute on the rendered native element, 'cn(variants(), className)' to merge consumer overrides via twMerge. Export both the component and 'fooVariants' (e.g. inputVariants) so peer elements can reuse the shape (Composer textareas reuse inputVariants() to avoid duplicating the long class string). Focus idiom is 'outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px]' (matches button.tsx).

Biome noLabelWithoutControl + custom form components (overstory-6f5a): the biome a11y rule cannot detect a native /, to sibling-style
. Composer.tsx adopted this for Subject/From/Type/Priority. Body/Payload textareas keep wrapper-style because
